reviews.comment:
35 años pasando y para de en esta estación, baños limpios, remodelados, atención rápida en surtidores. Lo único que se extraña son las buenas medialunas de antaño.

(Translated by Google)
I've been passing through this station for 35 years and it's always been clean and remodeled, and the pumps are fast. The only thing I miss are the delicious croissants they used to have.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeW9TUERREAE
